prompt: The code does not compile. What is the bug?
choices: System.out.println cannot print int values in static methods
Static methods cannot access instance fields because there is no implicit 'this' reference
instanceField must be declared public to be accessed from a static method
int fields are automatically static in Java
explanation: Static methods belong to the class, not any instance. There is no 'this' available, so instance fields cannot be accessed. Fix: either make instanceField static, or pass an instance as a parameter: static void staticMethod(StaticAccess obj) { ... obj.instanceField ... }
